name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M45353 Black】Louis Vuitton launched the new Odeon small handbag for the 2020 Fall/Winter season, blending elegant style with practical function. The Monogram canvas features a zipper design for ample interior space, while the leather nameplate and reinforced leather corners continue the brand's heritage. The adjustable leather shoulder strap offers a comfortable shoulder or crossbody carry. 22 x 8 x 24 cm (Height x Width x Length)
